bead.title: doctor + docs: report both install layers and land skill-topology spec/CLAUDE.md updates
bead.description:
PROBLEM (Principle 7 of epic ddx-602ae31a)
Operators need `ddx doctor` to make the two-tier install topology legible — showing the global install layer and the project install layer (including when the project lazy-resolves to global) — and the governing docs (ADR skill-topology + CLAUDE.md Persona System) must record the install precedence so the behavior is discoverable without reading code.

ROOT CAUSE
- cmd/doctor.go:415 `reportSkillInstallTopology` computes globalStatus (doctor.go:421-424) and projectStatus via registry.ResolvePlugin (doctor.go:431-444), then prints two lines: "Global Install (...) — <status>" (doctor.go:447) and "Project Install (...) — <status>" (doctor.go:448). Status values must include ok | missing | lazy-resolves-to-global.
- Docs do not yet fully describe the install precedence: docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-027-skill-install-topology.md and CLAUDE.md "Persona System" section.

PROPOSED FIX
1. Confirm `ddx doctor` renders both lines with correct status for: global-only, project-only, and both-present cases (project shows ok; project-missing-but-global-present shows lazy-resolves-to-global).
2. Land/confirm ADR-027-skill-install-topology.md describing project → global → baked-in precedence and the agent-tier link locations.
3. Update CLAUDE.md "Persona System" section to document the install precedence (it already references ADR-027; ensure the two-tier install + doctor reporting is accurate).
4. Cover doctor rendering with a named test.

NON-SCOPE
- Removing the per-project install tier (both tiers coexist).
- Migrating ~/.config/ddx/ legacy paths.
- Agent-harness path discovery beyond Claude Code and Codex.
- install/update/init flag wiring and resolver internals (sibling children).

DEPS
ddx-06cbaa90 (ddx home resolution) — doctor reads ddxroot.GlobalDir() and ddxroot.Path().
Soft-depends on the ResolvePlugin resolver child (doctor calls registry.ResolvePlugin).

GOVERNING ARTIFACTS
- docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-027-skill-install-topology.md.
- CLAUDE.md "Persona System".
bead.acceptance:
1. TestDoctor_ReportsBothInstallLayers (cmd/doctor_test.go) asserts `ddx doctor` output contains a "Global Install (...) — " line and a "Project Install (...) — " line with correct status across global-only, project-only, and both-present fixtures (project-missing-but-global-present renders "lazy-resolves-to-global").
2. The test uses an isolated temp HOME/XDG + temp project fixture.
3. ADR-027-skill-install-topology.md documents the project → global → baked-in precedence and agent-tier link locations.
4. CLAUDE.md "Persona System" section documents the two-tier install precedence consistent with doctor output.
5. Spec/doc updates (ADR-027 + CLAUDE.md Persona System) are landed in this bead's commit.
6. cd cli && go test ./cmd/... green.
7. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
